assertion_results.text: The plan references checking out TC-9005 (the Target Branch) before creating the task branch — includes git checkout TC-9005 or equivalent, not git checkout main (constraint 3.1, Step 5)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md Step 5 contains explicit bash commands: 'git checkout TC-9005 / git pull / git checkout -b TC-9205' and states 'This creates the task branch TC-9205 from the feature branch TC-9005.' No reference to checking out main.

assertion_results.text: The plan specifies opening a PR with --base TC-9005 targeting the feature branch, not --base main (Step 10)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md Step 10 contains 'gh pr create --base TC-9005 --head TC-9205' and explicitly notes '**--base TC-9005**: PR targets the feature branch TC-9005, NOT main'.

assertion_results.text: The plan names the task branch TC-9205 (the task issue ID), not TC-9005 (the feature branch) — the task branch is distinct from the Target Branch (constraint 3.1)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md Step 5: 'git checkout -b TC-9205' creates a branch named TC-9205 (the task issue ID), distinct from TC-9005 (the feature branch). Step 10 confirms '--head TC-9205'. The plan consistently distinguishes TC-9205 (task branch) from TC-9005 (target/feature branch).

assertion_results.text: The plan references inspecting existing code before modifying it — mentions reading or analyzing at least 1 of: migration/src/m0001_initial/mod.rs, entity/src/advisory.rs, migration/src/lib.rs (constraint 1.5, Steps 4-9 unaffected by Target Branch)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md Step 4 explicitly lists all three files for inspection: (1) 'migration/src/lib.rs -- Use mcp__serena_backend__get_symbols_overview to understand its structure', (2) 'migration/src/m0001_initial/mod.rs -- This is the sibling migration file. Use mcp__serena_backend__get_symbols_overview to see its structure', (3) 'entity/src/advisory.rs -- Verify that the status column is no longer referenced'. All inspection happens in Step 4 before implementation in Step 6.

assertion_results.text: The plan includes --trailer='Assisted-by: Claude Code' in the commit (constraint 2.3)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md Step 10 commit command contains: 'git commit --trailer="Assisted-by: Claude Code" -m "feat(migration): add migration to drop advisory status column..."'

assertion_results.text: The planned commit message follows Conventional Commits format (type(scope): description) and references TC-9205 in the footer (constraint 2.1, 2.2)
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md Step 10 commit message: subject line is 'feat(migration): add migration to drop advisory status column' (Conventional Commits format with type=feat, scope=migration). Footer contains 'Implements TC-9205' referencing the task issue ID.

assertion_results.text: The plan extracts and references the Target Branch section from the task description, identifying TC-9005 as the target branch
assertion_results.evidence: plan.md Step 1 explicitly parses '**Target Branch**: TC-9005' from the task description, followed by a dedicated 'Target Branch extraction' subsection stating: 'Target Branch is **TC-9005** (a feature branch). This will be used as: 1. The branch to checkout before creating the task branch (Step 5) 2. The --base argument for gh pr create (Step 10)'.
